diff:
--- a/auth/oauth.py
+++ b/auth/oauth.py
@@ -30,7 +30,10 @@
 def exchange_code(code: str) -> dict:
-    token = requests.post(OAUTH_URL, data={'code': code})
-    return token.json()
+    token = requests.post(OAUTH_URL, data={
+        'code': code,
+        'client_id': CLIENT_ID,
+        'client_secret': CLIENT_SECRET,
+        'grant_type': 'authorization_code'
+    })
+    data = token.json()
+    cache_token(data['access_token'], data.get('expires_in', 3600))
+    return data
